title: Bodycam Ingestion Pipeline
subtitle: Bodycam uploads block all API threads
objective: Move heavy media ingestion to async processing and proper object storage.

concepts.title: Media Offload
concepts.description: Use blob storage as target for bodycam objects.

concepts.title: Async Upload Processing
concepts.description: Queue + worker should process ingestion post-request.

concepts.title: Metadata Database
concepts.description: Store searchable upload metadata in database.
